about_section.title: About Us
about_section.description: Royal Moment is your ideal platform to turn dreams into reality. We aim to provide the finest event planning services with high precision.
about_section.vision_text: To redefine the concept of luxury in the world of events, creating a unique experience characterized by trust and beauty.
about_section.mission_text: Facilitating access to top vendors, managing bookings accurately, and providing tailored consultations.
about_section.why_us_text: Because we care about details, innovate out-of-the-box ideas, and ensure your peace of mind on your big day.

services_section.title: Our Services
services_section.subtitle: We create unforgettable experiences for your special moments
services_section.service1_desc: Beyond planning, we weave your love story into every detail
services_section.service2_desc: Turning fleeting moments into timeless masterpieces
services_section.service3_desc: Adding a delicious touch of luxury to your celebrations

testimonials.quote: "Royal Moment made our wedding truly magical. Every detail was perfect!"
testimonials.author: - Sarah & Ahmed

footer.description: We turn your dreams into beautiful memories that last a lifetime.

royalWedding.description: Beautiful moments that remain timeless in memory with the most exquisite wedding details.
royalWedding.subTitle: Beautiful memories from the most exquisite weddings.
royalWedding.fullDescription: A curated collection of the most beautiful moments documenting the most luxurious weddings.

birthdays.description: Innovative arrangements and distinctive decorations that make birthdays more beautiful and joyful.
birthdays.subTitle: Celebrations full of color and joy.
birthdays.fullDescription: We execute birthday parties with modern ideas suitable for all ages with distinctive arrangements.

hajj.title: Hajj Return Reception
hajj.description: A reception worthy of the pilgrims with the most beautiful floral arrangements, hospitality, and welcoming decor.
hajj.subTitle: The most beautiful ideas for welcoming and greeting.
hajj.fullDescription: Executing Hajj reception arrangements in an elegant way that reflects the joy of returning from the Holy Land.

bachelorette.subTitle: Innovative ideas for a party full of fun.
bachelorette.fullDescription: Enjoy the most beautiful bachelorette party arrangements with modern touches and a festive atmosphere.

graduation.subTitle: Festive atmosphere full of pride and success.
graduation.fullDescription: We provide distinctive ideas for graduation parties with complete coordination of decor, tables, and details.

buffet.title: Open Buffet

buffet.subTitle: Delicious food with the most beautiful presentation styles.
buffet.fullDescription: We offer open buffet services with luxurious coordination suitable for weddings, graduations, birthdays, and all occasions.
